prompt: Generate Yann Lecun personal website using the block layout and simple, line-based style from the reference image to depict placeholders for content and features.
prompt_refined: Generate a conceptual wireframe design for Yann Lecun's personal website, displayed within a browser window frame. Replicate the multi-column, block-based layout from image 1, using its simple, line-based style. The design should depict content and feature placeholders using outline boxes, 'X' marks for images, and filled gray rectangles or lines for text areas. Specifically, include a large central content area with a "HEADLINE" and a main image placeholder, a left sidebar with distinct blocks for "Top Story," "Other top stories," and "News and buzz," a "Featured" section below the main content, and an "Ad" placeholder in the bottom-right, all matching the arrangement and placeholder styles of image 1.
objects: Large central content area with "HEADLINE" text
"Top Story" block with 'X' mark in left sidebar
"Other top stories" block in left sidebar (gray filled)
"News and buzz" block in left sidebar (gray filled)
